Class SeatCRUD

java.lang.Object
SeatCRUD
public class SeatCRUD extends Object
CRUD operations for the Seat table in the theater database. Provides methods to insert, delete, update, and retrieve seat records.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructor
    Description

    Deletes a seat from the database.

    Retrieves and displays seat details from the database.

    Updates the availability status of a seat.

    • SeatCRUD

      public SeatCRUD()

  • Method Details

    • seatInsert

      public void seatInsert(int seatID)
      Inserts a new seat into the database.
      Parameters:
      seatID - Unique identifier for the seat

    • seatDelete

      public void seatDelete(int seatID)
      Deletes a seat from the database.
      Parameters:
      seatID - The ID of the seat to delete

    • seatUpdateAvailability

      public void seatUpdateAvailability(int seatID, int isAvailable)
      Updates the availability status of a seat.
      Parameters:
      seatID - The ID of the seat to update
      isAvailable - 1 if available, 0 if not available

    • seatRetrieve

      public String seatRetrieve(int seatID)
      Retrieves and displays seat details from the database.
      Parameters:
      seatID - The ID of the seat to retrieve
      Returns:
      Seat details as formatted string, or null if not found
